name: pgic
description: Plataforma de Gestão de Incidentes Corporativos — DDD, Hexagonal, Microserviços (TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ)

scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter identity-service run test:integration && pnpm --filter request-service run test:integration && pnpm --filter incident-service run test:integration && pnpm --filter problem-change-service run test:integration && pnpm --filter sla-service run test:integration && pnpm --filter escalation-service run test:integration && pnpm --filter notification-service run test:integration && pnpm --filter audit-service run test:integration && pnpm --filter reporting-service run test:integration
scripts.dev:ngrok: bash -lc 'set -a; . ./.env; set +a; ngrok config add-authtoken "$NGROK_AUTHTOKEN" --config ./infra/ngrok.yml && ngrok http 5173 --domain "$NGROK_DOMAIN" --config ./infra/ngrok.yml'
scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:identity & pnpm run dev:request & pnpm run dev:incident & pnpm run dev:problem-change & pnpm run dev:sla & pnpm run dev:escalation & pnpm run dev:notification-service & pnpm run dev:audit-service & pnpm run dev:reporting-service & pnpm run dev:api-docs & pnpm run dev:frontend & pnpm run dev:bff
